question: List the names of all products that are not discontinued.
gold_sparql:
PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#>
SELECT ?name
WHERE {
  ?p a nw:Product .
  ?p nw:productName ?name .
  ?p nw:discontinued "false"^^xsd:boolean .
}

question: How many orders has customer ALFKI placed?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#>
SELECT (COUNT(?o) AS ?orderCount)
WHERE {
  ?c a nw:Customer .
  ?c nw:customerID "ALFKI" .
  ?o nw:placedBy ?c .
}

question: For each order placed by Berglunds snabbköp, list the product names on that order.
gold_sparql:
PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#>
SELECT ?orderDate ?productName
WHERE {
  ?c a nw:Customer .
  ?c nw:companyName "Berglunds snabbköp" .
  ?o nw:placedBy ?c .
  ?o nw:orderDate ?orderDate .
  ?o nw:hasOrderLine ?ol .
  ?ol nw:includesProduct ?p .
  ?p nw:productName ?productName .
}
ORDER BY ?orderDate

question: Which customers have ordered more than 2 distinct products across all their orders?
gold_sparql:
PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#>
SELECT ?companyName (COUNT(DISTINCT ?p) AS ?distinctProducts)
WHERE {
  ?c a nw:Customer .
  ?c nw:companyName ?companyName .
  ?o nw:placedBy ?c .
  ?o nw:hasOrderLine ?ol .
  ?ol nw:includesProduct ?p .
}
GROUP BY ?companyName
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?p) > 2)

question: List all customers who have at least one order containing a discontinued product, along with the name of that product.
gold_sparql:
PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?companyName ?productName
WHERE {
  ?c a nw:Customer .
  ?c nw:companyName ?companyName .
  ?o nw:placedBy ?c .
  ?o nw:hasOrderLine ?ol .
  ?ol nw:includesProduct ?p .
  ?p nw:productName ?productName .
  ?p nw:discontinued "true"^^xsd:boolean .
}
